entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum americanum (L.) Leeke, the primary crop studied for sterility maintainers and restorers

entities.name: MALE-STERILITY RESTORER LINES
entities.description: Lines that restore male fertility in hybrids

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINES
entities.description: Lines that maintain male sterility in hybrids

entities.name: MALE-STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant to produce functional pollen

entities.name: LINE 5141A
entities.description: A specific male-sterile line used for crossing with diverse germplasm

entities.name: F1 HYBRIDS
entities.description: The first generation offspring resulting from the cross between germplasm and line 5141A

entities.name: SEED SET
entities.description: The production of seeds on bagged ear heads used to classify fertility

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: Environmental condition where some lines behaved as male-fertile

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: Environmental condition where some lines behaved as male-sterile

entities.name: CAMEROON
entities.description: A country where male-sterility restorer lines were not distributed

entities.name: USSR
entities.description: A country where male-sterility restorer lines were not distributed

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where maintainer lines were concentrated

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: A morphological and agronomic character used to differentiate maintainer lines

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A morphological and agronomic character used to differentiate maintainer lines

entities.name: SPIKE LENGTH
entities.description: A morphological and agronomic character used to differentiate maintainer lines

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: A morphological and agronomic character used to differentiate maintainer lines

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of mating diverse germplasm with a male-sterile line
